gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from 11 to 21 to target Java 21.
Bump the Gatling core library version from 3.13.5 to 3.14.9.
Bump the Gatling Maven plugin version from 4.16.3 to 4.20.8.
Bump the Maven compiler plugin version from 3.14.0 to 3.14.1.
Bump the Maven Surefire plugin version from 3.5.3 to 3.5.4.
Bump the Scala Maven plugin version from 4.9.5 to 4.9.7.
Configure JVM arguments to set system and user preference roots to /tmp to avoid permission issues in containerized environments.
Add a JVM argument to disable the Steadybit agent attachment during Gatling execution.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Update the Go version used in the CI workflow to a newer major version.
Add a comment to suppress a SonarQube security rule warning for the reusable workflow usage.

.github/workflows/cla.yml.general_idea: Add a NOSONAR comment to suppress a SonarQube rule violation for the reusable workflow reference.
.github/workflows/cla.yml.human_impl: uses: steadybit/.github/.github/workflows/cla.yml@main # NOSONAR githubactions:S7637 - our own action

.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..general_idea: Suppress a SonarQube security rule warning for the dependabot metadata action by adding a NOSONAR comment.
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..human_impl: uses: dependabot/fetch-metadata@v2 # NOSONAR githubactions:S7637 - verified action creator

.github/workflows/ghcr-cleanup.yml.general_idea: Add a NOSONAR comment to suppress a SonarQube security rule warning for a reusable workflow call.
.github/workflows/ghcr-cleanup.yml.human_impl: uses: steadybit/extension-kit/.github/workflows/reusable-ghcr-cleanup.yml@main # NOSONAR githubactions:S7637 - our own action

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Go build stage base image from version 1.24 to 1.25 to align with newer toolchain requirements.
Upgrade the runtime base image from Azul Zulu OpenJDK 23 to 25 to support the target Java version.
Bump the installed Maven version from 3.9.6 to 3.9.11 for security and compatibility updates.
Change the Maven download source from dlcdn.apache.org to archive.apache.org to ensure availability of the specific version.
Disable JVM attachment for the steadybit agent to prevent potential compatibility issues or security restrictions in the new environment.

Makefile.general_idea: Add gofmt linting to the audit target to enforce code formatting standards.
Add a Makefile target to build the container image specifically for the AMD64 platform to support local Snyk compatibility.
Add a Makefile target to run Snyk vulnerability scans on the AMD64 container image.

README.md.general_idea: Document new environment variables and Helm values required for connecting to Gatling Enterprise.
README.md.human_impl: Added rows for STEADYBIT_EXTENSION_ENTERPRISE_API_TOKEN, ORGANIZATION_SLUG, API_BASE_URL, and SIMULATIONS_DISCOVERY_INTERVALL to the configuration table.

README.md.general_idea: Document methods for importing custom certificates to support self-signed Gatling Enterprise connections.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Importing your own certificates' with options for insecureSkipVerify and mounting custom CA certificates via ConfigMaps.

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/Chart.general_idea: Update the Helm chart version to reflect the new release.
Update the application version to match the new release tag.

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/templ.general_idea: Add support for injecting the enterprise API token via a Kubernetes secret or direct value.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/templ.human_impl:
- name: STEADYBIT_EXTENSION_ENTERPRISE_API_TOKEN
  valueFrom:
    secretKeyRef:
      name: {{ include "gatling.secret.name" . }}
      key: api-token

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/templ.general_idea: Add support for configuring the enterprise organization slug via environment variable.
Add support for disabling TLS verification via environment variable.

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.general_idea: Increase the default CPU limit for the deployment from 1000m to 2000m to accommodate higher load or performance requirements.
Enforce strict security best practices by adding container and pod security contexts, including dropping capabilities and running as non-root.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.human_impl: securityContext: { allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, capabilities: { drop: [ALL] }, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true }

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.general_idea: Add emptyDir volumes for /tmp and /opt/gatling/target to ensure the container has writable directories while maintaining a read-only root filesystem.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.human_impl: volumeMounts: [ { mountPath: /tmp, name: tmp-dir }, { mountPath: /opt/gatling/target, name: gatling-target-dir } ]

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.general_idea: Explicitly assign a dedicated service account to the deployment for better RBAC control.
Update test snapshots to include configurations for insecureSkipVerify and custom certificate handling.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.human_impl: manifest should match snapshot with insecureSkipVerify and custom certificates

charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.general_idea: Update test snapshots to include configuration for enterprise API token and organization slug.
charts/steadybit-extension-gatling/tests.human_impl: manifest should render enterprise api token
